arts.ttl: Luis Enrique downplays Arsenal's threats in Liverpool comparison ahead of European clash
arts.sum: Luis Enrique has confidently dismissed worries about Arsenal's prowess from set-pieces, indicating that his Paris Saint-Germain team will approach the upcoming clash at the Emirates with a standard game plan. The French titans have already seen off two English sides in the knockout stages of the competition, having eliminated Aston Villa and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Arsenal line-ups vs Crystal Palace as Butler-Oyedeji in, Saka and Saliba rested
arts.sum: Canton's Arsenal XI vs Crystal Palace: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Kiwior, Lewis-Skelly; Rice, Merino, Odegaard; Nwaneri, Trossard, Martinelli. For Arsenal, they need to be best prepared and most-rested for next week, but considering they do not have a game on the weekend, it makes sense to prioritise preparation, helped further by the dynamic that both teams have such key games coming up next.

arts.ttl: Leicester City considering ex-Arsenal midfielder as possible Ruud van Nistelrooy replacement?
arts.sum: Leicester City are reportedly considering a swoop for former Arsenal and Barcelona midfielder Cesc Fabregas to replace head coach Ruud van Nistelrooy.

arts.ttl: Arsenal midfielder may have played last game for Gunners as Mikel Arteta gives triple injury update
arts.sum: Arsenal head coach Mikel Arteta provides the latest on Bukayo Saka, Jorginho and Riccardo Calafiori ahead of Wednesday's Premier League showdown with Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace injury news: Oliver Glasner issues Ben Chilwell update, reveals how many changes are expected for Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner confirms why Ben Chilwell will miss Wednesday's Premier League clash with Arsenal and reveals how many changes he is set to make to his starting lineup.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals Bukayo Saka injury plan for Arsenal
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka is an injury concern for Arsenal ahead of a Champions League semi-final against PSG.

arts.ttl: Arsenal in talks over controversial £80m off-pitch deal as PSG twist confirmed
arts.sum: T-minus one week until Arsenal face Paris Saint-Germain in the first leg of a Champions League semi-final tie that will shape the club’s season both...

arts.ttl: Arsenal HIJACK close! Romano announces 'almost agreed' wonderkid deal
arts.sum: Aston Villa are closing in on an agreement for Arsenal target Sverre Nypan, according to Fabrizio Romano. Aston Villa close in on Nypan

arts.ttl: Injury updates on Saka, Calafiori and Jorginho
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka has a good chance of playing against Crystal Palace on Wednesday, Mikel Arteta confirmed in his pre-match press conference. "If we want to, I think he would have a good chance to play tomorrow."

arts.ttl: 'Almost done': Fabrizio Romano says player Arsenal were 'favourites to get' now closing in on PL rival move
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Arsenal are among the Premier League clubs who have been linked with Sverre Nypan in recent months. Arsenal were confident of signing...
